tournamentRules:
Tournament Rules
• Each run lasts 2 minutes.
• Total score = 0.6×typed points + 10×WPM + 5×accuracy − 20×misses.
• Rankings are based on highest total score.
• Challenge yourself and compete for the top spot on the leaderboard!
instructions: • Type the falling words before they reach the bottom
• Press Enter or Space to submit your word
• Build combos by typing words consecutively
• Higher levels bring faster and more challenging words
• You have 5 chances to miss words before game over
powerUpsDesc: Easy mode slows falling words without changing the spelling rules.

powerUpDescriptions.easyMode: Slows falling words without changing the spelling rules

powerfulPowerUpsDesc: Use Easy mode to slow falling words while keeping full-word spelling practice.
mainTitle: Free Spelling Game With Your Own Words
mainDesc1: Paste this week's spelling list and play instantly.
mainDesc2: My Spelling Game saves missed words, creates a replay round, and lets teachers or parents share the same practice link.
levelModeDesc2: Beginner: 50 basic words | Intermediate: 100 advanced words | Expert: 150 complex words | Gradually improve your typing skills
practiceModeDesc1: Free practice mode to improve your typing skills!
practiceModeDesc2: Customize duration, difficulty and speed | No level restrictions, focus on skill improvement | Perfect for daily practice
tournamentModeDesc2: Fixed 2-minute duration | Comprehensive scoring system | Compete with global players and showcase your skills
seoTitle1: Free Spelling Game With Your Own Words
seoPara1: My Spelling Game is a free custom spelling words game for parents, teachers, homeschool families, and ESL tutors who already have a weekly word list and need a quick way to make practice feel less repetitive.
seoPara2: Most spelling games use a fixed word bank. My Spelling Game lets you paste your own list, play immediately, and keep practice focused on the exact words that will appear on the next quiz.
seoTitle3: How to Use My Spelling Game for Spelling Practice
seoPara3: Paste words from a teacher handout, homework sheet, or homeschool curriculum. Start the falling-word game, type each word, then replay the words that were missed.
seoRules: Press Enter or Space to submit each word
Replay missed words after the round
Copy a practice link to share the same list
seoPara4: This tool is intentionally small. It is for the repeated weekly job: take a short spelling list, make a child practice it, find the missed words, then practice those again.
seoTips: Paste only the current week's words.
Replay missed words until the list is clean.
Share the same practice link with students or parents.
seoConclusion: Free to play, with no student accounts, no lesson builder, and no platform lock-in.
privacyIntro: My Spelling Game is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we handle your data:
localStorageDesc: • Your high scores and player names are stored locally in your browser using localStorage
• This data never leaves your device and is only accessible to you
• You can clear this data at any time through your browser settings
analyticsDesc: • We use Google Analytics to understand how players interact with the game
• This helps us improve the game experience
• No personally identifiable information is collected
• You can opt out by using browser extensions or privacy settings
advertisingDesc: • We use Google AdSense to display relevant advertisements
• Ad personalization follows Google's privacy policies
• You can manage ad preferences through Google's Ad Settings
rightsDesc: • You can clear your local scores at any time
• You can disable analytics through browser settings
• You can block advertisements using ad blockers
contactDesc: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact us through our website.
clearDataConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all your local data? This will permanently delete your leaderboard scores and cannot be undone.
dataCleared: Your local data has been cleared successfully.

shareText2: My Spelling Game turns any weekly spelling list into a falling-word typing game. Paste your words, play, and replay missed words.

emptyLeaderboard: No scores yet. Be the first to play!

index.title: Free Spelling Game With Your Own Words | My Spelling Game
index.description: Paste your weekly spelling list and play a free spelling game with your own words. Replay missed words and share a no-login practice link.
index.ogTitle: Free Spelling Game With Your Own Words
index.ogDescription: Paste your weekly spelling list, play instantly, then replay missed words.

practice.title: My Spelling Game - Practice Mode | Free Typing Practice
practice.description: Practice your typing skills with My Spelling Game's Practice Mode. Customize duration, difficulty and speed. No level restrictions, focus on skill improvement. Perfect for daily typing practice.
practice.ogDescription: Improve your typing speed in Practice Mode with infinite play and customizable settings.

tournament.title: My Spelling Game - Tournament Mode | Competitive Typing Challenge
tournament.description: Challenge yourself in My Spelling Game Tournament Mode with 2-minute timed sessions. Compete for leaderboard rankings with comprehensive scoring system. Test your typing skills against global players.
tournament.ogDescription: Challenge yourself in Tournament Mode with 2-minute timed sessions and compete for leaderboard rankings.

aboutIntro1: My Spelling Game turns any weekly spelling list into a falling-word typing game.
aboutIntro2: It is built for parents, teachers, homeschool families, and ESL tutors who need quick spelling practice with missed-word replay and no student accounts.
aboutDev: Hi! I'm an indie developer who enjoys building small, polished web experiences. I care about usability, accessibility, and language friendliness.
aboutTech1: Fast vanilla JavaScript with modular architecture
aboutTech2: Optimized canvas rendering and particle effects
aboutTech4: Missed-word replay and shareable practice links
aboutThanks: Thanks for playing and sharing feedback. Your support helps make the game better.
contactEmailDesc: For support, feedback or collaboration, please email:
contactResponse: As a solo developer, I try to reply within 2–3 business days.
contactPrivacy: Emails are used only to respond to your message. No newsletter or marketing emails will be sent.
